researchGate.title: Disclaimer
researchGate.lead: All products on this website are supplied strictly for laboratory research purposes only.
researchGate.body: Products must not be used for human or animal consumption, diagnosing, treating, curing, or preventing any disease.
points: You are at least 18 years of age.
You are a qualified researcher or purchasing for qualified laboratory research.
You will not use these products for human or animal consumption.
You accept responsibility for compliance with laws in your jurisdiction.
Any purchase will comply with Aura Peptides terms and research-use restrictions.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.headline: Everything you need to know
faq.intro: Quick answers for ordering, research-use limits, product handling, and support.

items.title: Research Use Only / Not for Human Consumption
items.body: Aura Peptides products are supplied solely for laboratory research. They are not medicines, foods, cosmetics, or products for human or animal use.

items.title: Product Testing
items.body: Batch review, authentication, and documentation are prioritized. If you need a specific certificate or lot document, contact support before ordering.

items.title: Peptide Form
items.body: Peptides are supplied in the form shown on each product listing. Keep materials cool, dry, sealed, and away from direct light unless a label says otherwise.

items.title: Storage Instructions
items.body: Use the product label as the source of truth. Refrigeration or freezing is commonly preferred for longer-term stability.

items.title: Processing and Dispatch
items.body: Orders are prepared during Australian business days. Large or special orders may need additional handling time.

items.title: Order Tracking
items.body: When tracking is available, use the tracking page or contact support with your order email and reference number.

items.title: Missing, Damaged, or Wrong Items
items.body: Report issues promptly with photos of the package and item so support can review and resolve the shipment.

items.title: Order Status
items.body: Payment pending means payment is still being verified. Processing means the order is being prepared. Completed means dispatch has occurred.

items.title: Zero-Tolerance Policy
items.body: Aura Peptides does not provide usage guidance. Any indication of misuse, abuse, or non-research intent may result in refusal of service.

items.title: Stripe Checkout
items.body: Checkout is handled through Stripe in AUD. Stripe may request billing, phone, and Australian shipping details.

items.title: Refunds and Disputes
items.body: All orders are reviewed under the refunds and returns policy. Contact support before opening a dispute so the issue can be investigated.

labResults.title: COA Library
labResults.intro: Current lot documentation can be published here or requested from support before purchase.

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.intro: Track your order status using your order reference and billing email.
tracking.instructions: Enter the details from your receipt or Stripe confirmation. If tracking is not yet available, contact support with the same details.
tracking.note: Live courier lookup can be connected when fulfillment data is available.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.hoursBody: Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM AEST, excluding public holidays.
contact.responseBody: Most ordering and shipping requests receive a response within one business day. Peak periods may take longer.
contact.limitationsBody: Support is limited to shipping, payments, product documentation, and order matters. Aura Peptides does not provide usage, dosing, or application guidance.
contact.helpBody: For fast ordering support, message Aura Peptides on Telegram.
contact.coaBody: Visit the COA Library or contact support for available documentation.
contact.trackingBody: Track an order using the order tracking page.
contact.noticeBody: Aura Peptides does not provide recommendations on product usage or research applications. Researchers are responsible for qualified protocols and compliance.
contact.policyBody: Any indication of misuse or abuse of research materials may result in refusal of service.
contact.acknowledge: I acknowledge and agree to the Important Notice and Zero Tolerance Policy stated above

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern access to Aura Peptides and purchases made through aurapeptides.com.au.

sections.title: Research-Use Restriction
sections.body: Products are supplied for laboratory research only. They are not intended for human or animal consumption, medical use, food use, cosmetic use, or household use.

sections.title: Customer Responsibility
sections.body: Customers are responsible for ensuring they are qualified to purchase, possess, store, and use research materials in their jurisdiction.

sections.title: No Medical Advice
sections.body: Information on this website is provided for catalog and ordering purposes only and must not be interpreted as medical, veterinary, or research protocol advice.

sections.title: Order Review
sections.body: Aura Peptides may refuse or cancel orders that appear inconsistent with research-use requirements or compliance obligations.

sections.title: Stripe Payments
sections.body: Payment processing is provided by Stripe. Orders are not accepted until checkout is completed and payment is confirmed.

returns.title: Refunds & Returns
returns.intro: Because Aura Peptides supplies research materials, all order issues are reviewed carefully for product integrity and chain-of-custody.

sections.title: All Sales Reviewed Case-by-Case
sections.body: Refunds, replacements, or credits are not automatic. Contact support with your order details and photos where relevant.

sections.title: Damaged or Incorrect Items
sections.body: Report damaged, missing, or incorrect items within 7 days of delivery. Include packaging photos and product photos for review.

sections.title: Address Errors
sections.body: Customers are responsible for entering accurate shipping information. Contact support immediately if an address needs correction before dispatch.

sections.title: Cold Chain and Handling
sections.body: Follow storage instructions on the label when received. Aura Peptides cannot control product handling after delivery.

footer.tagline: Specialized peptides advancing Australian laboratory research supply.
footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: These products are intended for laboratory research purposes only, and are not for human or animal consumption. They are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease and must not be used as a food, drug, cosmetic, or household product.
footer.compliance: By accessing this website or purchasing from Aura Peptides, you accept responsibility for compliance with applicable laws and understand that no information here should be treated as medical advice.
footer.termsNotice: You also acknowledge that purchases are governed by the Aura Peptides Terms of Service and research-use restrictions.
